A little memory book

Almost One Beautiful Year 🤍

a small website, made with a lot of love, for Bubuu 🌸

Page Two

Almost One Beautiful Year Together 🤍

Dear Bubuu, Can you believe it? Our friendship is almost one year old. Time really went by so fast. These days, people meet... talk for a few weeks... and slowly forget each other. But somehow... we are still here. Still talking. Still laughing. Still sharing random moments. That makes this friendship very special. I'm really happy that life gave me a friend like you. And I truly hope this is just the beginning of many more years.

Page Three

You Are Really Special 🌸

Some people come into our lives for a short time. Some stay forever. I honestly hope you stay. Because people like you are very hard to find. You make conversations feel easy. You make ordinary days feel better. You make me smile without even trying. Thank you for being such a lovely friend. And yes... you are officially one of my favorite people. 🩷

Page Four

Things I Will Always Remember ✨

I'll always remember... Our random conversations. The funny moments. The silly jokes. The late replies. The fast replies. The little things that nobody else notices. These memories may look small. But they mean a lot to me. One year may not sound like a very long time. But in today's world... staying friends for this long is actually something beautiful. Thank you for staying.

Page Five

A Small Truth 🤍

I don't say this often. But... I'm really thankful that you are in my life. You became someone I genuinely care about. You became someone I respect. Someone I appreciate. Someone whose happiness matters to me. And that's why... this website exists. Just to remind you... that you are important.

Our Scrapbook

Little Pieces of Us 📸

A few moments, a few silly bears, and a lot of love.
Tap any photo ✨

The Final Page

Forever Friends 🤍

Dear Bubuu, Thank you. Thank you for becoming such an important part of my life. I'm really grateful that our friendship has stayed this strong. Almost one year... and it still feels special. In today's world, people forget each other so quickly. That's why I appreciate you even more. Thank you for staying. Thank you for understanding me. Thank you for all the laughs. Thank you for all the memories. I don't know what the future looks like. But I truly hope our friendship stays just like this. No matter how busy life becomes... I hope we always stay close. Keep smiling. Keep being yourself. Because that's exactly why you are so special. Take care, Bubuu. 🤍🌸

Best Friends Forever ♾️🤍
Made with lots of love and care... 🤍

One Last Thing

One Last Thing... 🥺
